summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new florist e-commerce features: delivery date selection and box personalization. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend checkout page successfully implements all new features including delivery date restrictions, Saturday premium pricing, and complete box customization workflow.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/delivery/options returns correct date restrictions (no Sundays, min 2 days)
Backend API: Saturday delivery fee correctly set to £8.99, standard to £5.99
Backend API: Box personalization options include 5 box colors and 7 ribbon colors
Backend API: Order creation validates delivery dates (rejects too soon and Sunday dates)
Backend API: Order creation includes box personalization data when provided
Backend API: Saturday delivery orders correctly marked with premium fee
Frontend: Checkout page loads delivery date selector with 9 available dates
Frontend: Saturday delivery dates show SAT badge (found 4 Saturday options)
Frontend: Box personalization toggle works correctly
Frontend: Box color selection from 5 available colors
Frontend: Ribbon color selection from 7 available colors
Frontend: Box message input with character limit validation
Frontend: Order summary displays selected delivery date and box personalization
Frontend: Form validation enables place order button when all fields completed
Frontend: Order total calculation includes delivery fee (£55.98 total)
